overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Western-themed video game showing a cowboy character exploring a dimly lit wooden house interior at night. The character carries a lantern and moves through narrow hallways and rooms, opening doors and examining the rustic furnishings.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow wooden hallway with floral wallpaper

events.description: character walks through doorway from fireplace room into narrow hallway

agents.ego_description: cowboy character holding a lantern walks steadily through the dimly lit hallway

entered.detail: stone and brick fireplace with wooden mantel visible in the initial room
dark wooden dresser with drawers against the wall
yellowed wallpaper with floral pattern covering hallway walls
closed wooden door at the end of the hallway

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a rustic room with a brick fireplace, then transitions into a narrow hallway with floral wallpaper and wooden floorboards. The character walks forward holding a lantern, approaching a closed wooden door at the hallway's end.

scene_state.functional_zone: small bedroom with windows and wooden furniture

events.description: character opens the wooden door and steps into the room beyond

agents.ego_description: opening the door and stepping into a room with windows while holding the lantern up

entered.detail: small wooden table with items on top near the wall
simple wooden chair against the far wall
framed painting hanging on the wall above the chair
double window with drawn curtains allowing some light through

segments.scene_description: The character opens the wooden door and enters a small bedroom. The room contains a wooden table, a chair beneath a framed picture, and a window with curtains on the right wall. The lighting remains warm and dim, cast by the character's lantern.

scene_state.functional_zone: bedroom corner with multiple windows and a wood stove

events.description: character turns to examine the window with curtains on the left wall

agents.ego_description: moving around the room examining the windows, wooden bench, and furnishings while holding the lantern

entered.detail: long wooden bench with items sitting on top beneath the window
old cast iron wood-burning stove with pipe extending to ceiling

segments.scene_description: The character explores the bedroom, panning around to reveal a wooden bench beneath a window and a cast iron stove in the corner. The camera moves slowly as the character examines the room's details, with the window with curtains shifting from the right to the left side of the frame.

events.description: character opens the wooden closet door revealing a dark interior

agents.ego_description: approaching the closet door, opening it, and peering into the dark space inside

entered.detail: interior wooden door with brass handle leading to a closet
pitch black closet interior barely illuminated by the lantern

segments.scene_description: The character moves toward a wooden closet door in the corner of the room and opens it, revealing a dark interior. The cast iron stove is now visible in the center of the frame as the character peers into the closet space, ending the exploration sequence.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rustic home, transitioning from a cozy living area into a dimly lit bedroom. It begins in a room featuring a brick fireplace before moving forward into a narrow hallway lined with floral wallpaper and wooden floorboards. As the character reaches the end of the hall, the camera follows them through a wooden door and into a small bedroom containing a table, a chair, and a curtained window. The scene then pans slowly across the room to reveal a wooden bench and a cast iron stove, shifting the perspective of the window from the right to the left of the frame. Finally, the camera moves toward the corner of the room to open a wooden closet door, peering into the dark interior with the stove remaining visible in the center.
